title: chenopodiastrum fasciculosum
intro: Chenopodiastrum fasciculosum is a plant species also known as the creeping spurge, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Chenopodiastrum fasciculosum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce swelling and pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Chenopodiastrum fasciculosum is often made into infusions, tinctures, or applied topically as a poultice to harness its medicinal properties.
